title: Media Performance Analyst (m/w/d)
matched_skills: German B1+ (borderline — role asks for 'good' German)
missing_skills: Paid Social hands-on execution (Meta, TikTok etc.)
key_requirements: Performance channel knowledge: Tracking, Retargeting, Bid-Management, A/B Testing, Paid Social, Programmatic, SEA
Analytics tools: Adobe Analytics, Google Analytics, Exactag
Marketing Performance Analytics and Attribution understanding
Good German and English (written and spoken)
cv_highlights: Attribution analytics and ROI measurement across multiple campaigns (IPC: 4.6M CNY, HSBC: USD 8M programme)
C-level performance reporting and data storytelling
Power BI (certified), Looker Studio, Qlik Sense — strong BI tool fluency
gaps: No hands-on paid media platform experience (Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager)
No Adobe Analytics or Google Analytics hands-on experience mentioned
No programmatic/DSP or bid-management tool experience
German B1+ is borderline for 'good German' requirement
recommendation: Good match on analytics methodology and attribution mindset. Gaps in specific ad platform tools. CV should lead with attribution, tracking/QA, and funnel analysis. Frame BI tool fluency as transferable to GA/Adobe Analytics.
